issues.description: Condition missing: 'If the number of DON!! cards on your field is equal to or less than the number on your opponent's field' must be represented as a DON comparison condition, not 'Always'. Current condition does not enforce the DON count requirement.
Target missing type filter: 'The Vinsmoke Family' type requirement not specified in target. Target should filter for {The Vinsmoke Family} Characters only.
